entries.slop_test: all 58 gates passed by design review
entries.notes: Full Hallmark redesign: OKLCH token system, Workbench macrostructure for dashboard, solid-surfaces replacing glass/liquid-glass, centered nav on landing, no gradient headline, no InboxMockup chrome, lucide-react icon unification, 8-state interaction patterns, reduced-motion support, focus-visible rings ≥3:1 contrast.
